disclaimer: API list prices. All costs the harness reports are API-EQUIVALENT ESTIMATES (what these tokens WOULD cost on the API), not actual subscription/plan spend. Models without token accounting are skipped.

notes.claude-sonnet-5: Standard (non-promo) rate used. An introductory rate of $2/$10 per 1M in/out applies through 2026-08-31 but is intentionally NOT used here.
notes.claude_cost_source: The claude CLI reports total_cost_usd directly; the harness uses that for claude runs. These entries are kept for cross-checking and as a fallback.
notes.cursor_cost_source: cursor-agent reports token usage but no cost; the harness computes cost from these Cursor-published prices (all values official from the models-and-pricing table).
